title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.500
text:
*8.500.  Citation. — Sections 8.500 to 8.565 shall be known and may be cited as the "Tobacco Settlement Financing Authority Act".
(L. 2002 S.B. 1191) 
Effective 6-07-02 
*Section terminates upon satisfaction of all outstanding notes and obligations.  See section 8.589.
